summary: Comprehensive testing completed for 3 new features: 1) Schedule calendar page with weekly grid, appointments, navigation and doctor filter - FULLY WORKING; 2) Edit Details functionality in User Management - FULLY WORKING; 3) Invoice PDF download with jsPDF - FULLY WORKING. All 22 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The three features requested for testing are functioning correctly.

issues: React hydration warning in console about <tr> being child of <span> in table - this is a minor HTML structure issue but does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React console warning about HTML structure in Invoices.js table - <tr> cannot be child of <span> - consider fixing table structure to avoid hydration warnings
Minor: Missing aria-describedby for some DialogContent components - accessibility improvement
Good: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from POST /api/seed - admin user venkatrajana3199@gmail.com with session token test_session_1771862773068
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three features tested and working: 1) Schedule page at /schedule with weekly calendar, time slots 7AM-8PM, day columns Mon-Sun, doctor filter for admin/staff, appointment clicking opens detail dialog; 2) User Management Edit at /users - dropdown menu has 'Edit Details', opens dialog with name/phone/specialization(for doctors)/address fields, PUT /api/users/{user_id} updates successfully; 3) Invoice PDF at /invoices - 'Download PDF' button in invoice detail dialog uses jsPDF to generate vedanth-invoice-{id}.pdf file. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_schedule_usermanagement_invoices.py cover all API endpoints. Session token test_session_1771862773068 created for admin user testing.

details: Route /schedule accessible and renders weekly calendar
Time slots from 7AM to 8PM displayed
Day columns Mon-Sun with dates shown
Week navigation (prev/next/today) working
Doctor filter dropdown visible for admin/staff roles
Appointments displayed in grid with color coding by status
Clicking appointment opens detail dialog with patient info
Dialog has 'View Full Details' button
Dropdown menu in User Management has 'Edit Details' option
Clicking Edit Details opens dialog with form fields
Fields: Full Name, Phone, Specialization (for doctors), Address
Save Changes button calls PUT /api/users/{user_id}
User data updates and refreshes list on success
Success toast 'User updated successfully' appears
Invoice detail dialog has 'Download PDF' button
Button uses jsPDF to generate PDF
PDF includes header with Vedanth Clinic branding
PDF contains invoice number, status, patient info, doctor info
PDF has itemized line items and total amount
File downloads as vedanth-invoice-{invoice_id}.pdf
Success toast 'Invoice PDF downloaded' appears

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/appointments - returns appointments with patient_name and doctor_name
PUT /api/users/{user_id} - update name, phone, address, specialization working
GET /api/invoices - returns list with patient and appointment data
GET /api/invoices/{invoice_id} - returns full data including doctor for PDF
GET /api/doctors - returns doctors list for filter dropdown
